seoTitle: South Kilkerran vs South Plympton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Kilkerran and South Plympton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Kilkerran vs South Plympton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Kilkerran and South Plympton.
heading: South Kilkerran vs South Plympton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Kilkerran, South Australia and South Plympton, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Plympton has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to South Kilkerran (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Kilkerran or South Plympton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Kilkerran has a flood risk score of 51/100, while South Plympton scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Kilkerran scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. South Plympton scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Kilkerran or South Plympton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Plympton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
